fields.name: debit_credit_instructions
fields.description: A collection of debit and credit instructions

children.name: instruction_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the instruction

children.name: timestamp
children.description: Timestamp of when the instruction was created

children.name: source_department
children.description: The department that originated the instruction

children.name: target_department
children.description: The department that will receive the instruction

children.name: instructions
children.description: A collection of individual debit and credit instructions

children.name: transaction_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the transaction

children.name: account_number
children.description: The account number associated with the instruction

children.name: instruction_type
children.description: Type of instruction (debit or credit)

children.name: amount
children.description: The amount associated with the instruction

children.name: currency
children.description: Currency of the transaction

children.name: description
children.description: Description of the instruction

children.name: fund_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the fund

children.name: fund_name
children.description: Name of the fund

children.name: effective_date
children.description: Date when the instruction will be effective

children.name: status
children.description: Status of the instruction (pending, approved, etc.)

children.name: total_debit_amount
children.description: Total debit amount for the instructions

children.name: total_credit_amount
children.description: Total credit amount for the instructions

children.name: batch_reference
children.description: Unique identifier for the batch of instructions

children.name: approval_status
children.description: Status of the approval process

children.name: approver
children.description: Name of the person who approved the instructions

children.name: approval_timestamp
children.description: Timestamp when the approval was made
